query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status, oi.productId, oi.productName, oi.quantity FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.establishmentId = 30001 ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 10
